title: Syrian Plum Chicken Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Syria, made with tender chicken, sweet plums, and a hint of bitter spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, salt, and pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped tomato and cook until the liquid has evaporated, about 5 minutes.
Add the halved plums and stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the chicken is cooked through and the plums are tender, about 20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
